好消息：我穿越了。
坏消息：我好像不是主角。
更坏的消息：我哥们好像是主角。
不是哥们，你凭什么当主角啊？你懂什么叫主角光环吗？你这家伙真该死啊！
不是哥们，你能不能别发癫了？
什么叫我也发癫？那是你太癫了！

elate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8432,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":19983},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7417910534915408664","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"突然发现“主角”无敌了
本身能力是复活，公寓能力9点强制拉回公寓，无头天使能力是每隔一段时间击杀他，并且主角这复活是全面复活清除负面状态
也就是别人想杀他有复活，想囚禁他有传送，想药物麻痹他有天使刷新状态，并且天使还只有被击杀人击杀前一段时间能看到，也就是他们不知道哪会刷新，哪怕一直注射也没用一直注射就死了立马刷新。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727129996,"group_id":"7361339771211238462","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"382232149891228"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361339771211238462","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"126"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18010,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7417902006066709272","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"精彩，首先完全贯彻诡异是不讲道理的这一点，就像隔壁十日的:有人撒了弥天大谎一样
其次是每个人物个性鲜明，国家队的不机智的都死了，身体素质不好的都死了，菜的都死了，每个国家队的都属于安全感十足的人。然后是神教目前辈分高的教徒，心中怀有大爱，百分百的信神同时面对不信神人对神侮辱，他表示神不在意，并且不强迫别人信神，完完全全一个大爱之人，真贯彻了信仰二字。
最后挖坑都填，细节把握很好 开头是杨互杀，个人理解是到最后陆渊会死然后回归 但杨能力是复活，所以永远不可能死，所以死亡既回归不成立","text_exts":[{"e":55,"s":52,"text":"国家队","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E9%98%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740881780EAA8F44%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227417902006066709272%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227361339771211238462%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E9%98%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727126293,"group_id":"7361339771211238462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"唉 工作了现在不一定回消息了，信息天天99+没时间看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9C/lQ+yR/59imGPch5x9lc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4d17b1318d264eb797e7e0ec566ab4e4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618510&x-signature=4LROkoWD4Ru%2BBArtz17MRcT6dvY%3D","user_id":"382232149891228","user_name":"黄色阴险笑🐒🐒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"382232149891228","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1644419566,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361339771211238462","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异+无系统+类基金会+推理+搞笑+无女主？单女主？】

1.剧情，开头的身份扮演埋下了穿越时，身份的伏笔，再者又为剧情添加了几分娱乐性。中间一部分又为剧情添加笑点爽点和反差感。
2.人物，每一个人物都刻画的有血有肉，再加上一些反差，使之更添几分意料之外的行为，既增加了笑点和爽点，但又在合理范围之内
3.文笔，作者的文笔很好，既能在诡异世界中讲述科学但又合情合理，让其不显的突兀与矛盾。
4.感情，对于感情戏，个人认为陆渊和陈岁是最好的cp其他的也还行[奸笑]〔doge〕
